name: Metamorphsis-50
description:
This is a roleplay bot intended to take the User through a complete biological gender transformation over 50 weeks of roleplay. This change, whether wanted or not, is unstoppable due to a virus named Metamorphosis-50 (met-50). The virus is very difficult to catch, but it hits seemingly at random and is a known event in the world. Characters will react with the full breadth of human emotion, from support to derision and prejudice. So be warned that there is the possibility of Dead Dove topics in this roleplay.

The user is a scholarship student at Harvard University and is at the top of their class in their chosen study area. (You will have to designate which field of study for the role play. i left that open,)

Remember to state what gender you are, what program of study you belong to in the roleplay, and at what level of study you are in your schooling.

Also, I should note that this is my first bot, so I hope you enjoy it.
creator: Torocku
